post.description:
Register a new model version.

Returns 409 if (name, version) already exists — versions are
immutable, create a new version instead.

get.description: List all registered models with optional filters.

patch.description:
Update model status or engine artifacts (build pipeline callback).

Only ``status`` and ``engine_artifacts`` are mutable — all other
fields are frozen once registered.

delete.description: Deregister a model.  Fails if active deployments exist.

post.description:
Create a new deployment for a registered model.

The deployment starts in ``pending`` status.  The deploy workflow
(or operator) should PATCH status through provisioning → running.

patch.description:
Update deployment scaling config or status.

Status transitions are used by the deploy workflow to report
progress: ``pending → provisioning → running`` or ``→ failed``.

When status transitions to ``running`` **and** ``endpoint_url`` is
provided, the model is added to the inference routing table.

delete.description: Terminate a deployment and remove from routing.

post.description: Register a compiled engine in the cache (upsert by cache key).

get.description: List cached engines with optional filters.

Look up a cached engine by its component fields.

Returns cache_hit=true with the entry if found, or cache_hit=false
with entry=null if not.  A version mismatch is treated as a miss
(lazy invalidation).
Get a specific engine cache entry.

delete.description: Delete a specific engine cache entry.

Invalidate all cached engines for a specific TRT-LLM version.

Use this for proactive cache busting when the engine cache exceeds
~20 entries and lazy invalidation becomes too slow.

get.description: Versioned service health — model counts, deployment counts, uptime.

GPU pool capacity summary.

Aggregates GPU SKU requirements from registered models and
active deployments to show what pools exist and their utilisation.

model_id.title: Model Id
model_id.description: ID of the model to deploy.

status_url.title: Status Url
status_url.description: Pollable URL for tracking deployment status.

DeploymentResponse.title: DeploymentResponse
DeploymentResponse.description: Deployment record returned by all deployment endpoints.

cache_hit.title: Cache Hit
cache_hit.description: True if a matching engine was found.

cache_key.title: Cache Key
cache_key.description: The computed cache key for the query.

entry.description: The cached engine entry, or null on miss.

total_gpu_allocated.title: Total Gpu Allocated
total_gpu_allocated.description: Estimated GPUs allocated (running replicas × TP degree).

min_replicas_sum.title: Min Replicas Sum
min_replicas_sum.description: Sum of min_replicas across all deployments.

max_replicas_sum.title: Max Replicas Sum
max_replicas_sum.description: Sum of max_replicas across all deployments.

GpuPoolInfo.title: GpuPoolInfo
GpuPoolInfo.description: GPU pool capacity summary for a single SKU.

backends.title: Backends
backends.description: Backend health summary from health monitor.

ModelResponse.title: ModelResponse
ModelResponse.description: Model record returned by all model endpoints.

tp_degree.title: Tp Degree
tp_degree.description: Tensor parallelism degree the engine was compiled for.

engine_uri.title: Engine Uri
engine_uri.description: Full Blob URI of compiled engine artifacts.

weight_uri.title: Weight Uri
weight_uri.description: URI to model weights (az://, hf://, s3://).

RegisterModelRequest.title: RegisterModelRequest
RegisterModelRequest.description: POST /api/v1/models — register a new model version.

status.description: New deployment status (used by workflow callbacks).

endpoint_url.title: Endpoint Url
endpoint_url.description: Backend URL — set when deployment reaches 'running'.

UpdateDeploymentRequest.title: UpdateDeploymentRequest
UpdateDeploymentRequest.description:
PATCH /api/v1/deployments/{id} — update scaling config or status.

Status updates are used by the deploy workflow to report progress:
``pending → provisioning → running`` or ``→ failed``.

When transitioning to ``running``, also set ``endpoint_url`` so the
model can be registered in the routing table for inference traffic.

engine_artifacts.title: Engine Artifacts
engine_artifacts.description: Map of GPU SKU → compiled engine blob URI.

UpdateModelRequest.title: UpdateModelRequest
UpdateModelRequest.description:
PATCH /api/v1/models/{id} — update model status (build pipeline callback).

Only ``status`` and ``engine_artifacts`` are mutable.  Everything
else is immutable once registered — create a new version instead.
